source.default: SELECT T.[Id] as [Value], T.[Code] as [Text] FROM [db_default].[Technicians] T inner join [db_default].[Farms] F on F.SubscriptionId = T.SubscriptionId WHERE F.Id = @FarmId and T.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY T.[Id], T.[Code]
source.sqlite: SELECT T.[Id] as [Value], T.[Code] as [Text] FROM [db_default].[Technicians] T inner join [db_default].[Farms] F on F.SubscriptionId = T.SubscriptionId WHERE F.Id = @FarmId and T.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY T.[Id], T.[Code]
source.sqlserver: SELECT T.[Id] as [Value], T.[Code] as [Text] FROM [db_default].[Technicians] T inner join [db_default].[Farms] F on F.SubscriptionId = T.SubscriptionId WHERE F.Id = @FarmId and T.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY T.[Id], T.[Code]

description.en: Unique code of the technician from the last service
description.es: Código único del técnico del último servicio
description.pt: Código único do técnico do último serviço
